question: Which West Region vehicles are statistical outliers by distance, idle time, or trip count this week?
reasoning: Nakamura (Truck 32) leads the West Region at 729 km and 31 trips, anchoring the SF–Mission–Bayview corridor. Oliveira (Van 31) is the region's efficiency standout at 7.4% idle — the lowest in the fleet — with consistent SFO-South SF turnarounds. Schreiber (Truck 34) carries the best fuel efficiency per km despite a mid-range distance total. Osei's 12.3% idle reflects Mission District congestion delays. Volkov's low utilisation (8 trips, 174 km) stands out against a 5-vehicle fleet — this vehicle is a candidate for redeployment or load rebalancing from Nakamura's corridor.
